title: Animtr
description: This project adds an anime-style overlay to the whole world! It comes with a candy mode and the normal mode for even more fun.
body: A customizable Minecraft shaderpack that transforms the game into a polished anime aesthetic. eatures crisp white sticker borders with soft edges, vibrant pastel color grading, and smooth toon shading with configurable cel levels. It includes material-dependent palette corrections for water, sand, and dirt, plus optional glow effects for glowing entities and ore blocks. You can toggle on extra detail to preserve texture clarity, or enable Candy Mode for biome-specifc color boosts on foliage and water. Everything is adjustable from border thickness and opacity to hand-drawn grain and warmth—fully configurable from Minecraft's shader settings menu.
